title: TerraFirmaZixy
description: Addons to TerraFirmaCraft Also i took inpiration from SquidO2400 and his modpack TerraFirmaSquid and they have a Upcoming remake of that pack wich i playtested.
body:
My first mod pack that i decided to make on TerraFirmaCraft. this modpack adds some realism to Minecraft by using different mods addons resource packs and shaders. This modpack is designed to make your next TerraFirmaCraft playthrough better. I took inspiration from SquidO2400's modpack TerraFirmaSquid and his upcoming TerraFirmaSquid 2 which i am a playtester of.
creds: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-casting-with-channels
